channel.title: X-Files on KPress R Blog
channel.description: Recent content in X-Files on KPress R Blog

item.title: The Truth is Out There
item.description: I’m a huge X-Files fan. I also love working with text data. I’ve had an idea floating around for a while to do a tidy text analysis on X-Files episode scripts. But…how to get the data? That’s where web scraping comes in. The X-Files has been around long enough that there are tons of fandom sites, and you can easily find transcripts of the original 9 seasons.
